arts.ttl: 'Is this guy crazy?' - Arne Slot makes January transfer window and Mohamed Salah contract claims
arts.sum: Reaction from Liverpool head coach Arne Slot after the clash with West Ham United in the Premier League

arts.ttl: “Time for change” | West Ham thrashed 5-0 in abysmal Liverpool display
arts.sum: West Ham’s embarrassing performance results in Liverpool thumping. That result has been coming for some time. Although the Hammers were unbeaten in 4 games, they hadn’t particularly looked deserving of any of the points they picked up, including wins over Wolves and Southampton. While the first 20 minutes wasn’t awful, Liverpool started the game stronger... The post “Time for change” | West Ham thrashed 5-0 in abysmal Liverpool display appeared first on The West Ham Way.

arts.ttl: Analysis: Why Liverpool are 'nearly impossible' to defend against
arts.sum: Match of the Day pundits Danny Murphy and Ashley Williams analyse Liverpool's performance against West Ham United where they won 5-0 to stretch their lead at the top of the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot weighs in on Trent Alexander-Arnold's future after Liverpool star appeared to drop a major hint about Real Madrid interest with his goal celebration in 5-0 win at West Ham
arts.sum: With just six months remaining on his Liverpool contract, speculation has been rife that the 26-year-old will opt to seek pastures new when his deal expires.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah contract latest: Update as Liverpool manager Arne Slot faces January transfer window problem
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah provides fans with a concerning update on his contract embargo with Liverpool as fans seek reassurances that he will stay at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah issues latest worrying update on Liverpool contract talks
arts.sum: Reds hero will be able to talk to foreign clubs on Wednesday

arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has on Sunday dropped something of a hint, regarding the future of long-time Real Madrid target Trent Alexander-Arnold. The name of defender Alexander-Arnold has of…

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon hits back at Liverpool transfer statement in explosive Newcastle promise
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool FC transfer news as Anthony Gordon reiterates Newcastle United future stance - after his summer saga involving the Reds.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot ignores Jamie Carragher's demand regarding two Liverpool players
arts.sum: Arne Slot led Liverpool to a comprehensive 5-0 win at West Ham to ensure they keep a healthy lead at the top of the Premier League table going into the new year

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot admits he has no control over expiring stars’ futures
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold will be able to enter talks with foreign clubs as of January 1.
